evaluations.message: Finding exceeded 192-day remediation threshold (210 days since detection). Accepted per VDR-TFR-MAV. Compensating controls documented.

findings.title: SSL Certificate Signed Using Weak Algorithm
findings.description: Legacy system SSL certificate uses SHA-1. Vendor patch unavailable. Finding accepted after exceeding 192-day threshold per FedRAMP 20x VDR-TFR-MAV policy.
